texto: Unfortunately, we cannot live our lives according to the moral and religious convictions or petrified dogmas of our forebears. We have an obligation to live by our own faith, forever renewing the traditions of the past and adapting them to the demands of own time and place.
explicacao: Citação de Farquhar McHarg sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Unfortunately, we cannot live our lives according to the moral and religious convictions or petri…” articula vida, freedom, life-philosophy em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como vida e life-philosophy.
